# CWE-379 vulnerable — Creation of Temporary File in Directory with Insecure Permissions
lang: go
file: CWE-379-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func StageReportDraft(c *GinCtx) error {
	dir := "/tmp/shared-reports"
	_ = os.MkdirAll(dir, 0777)
	path := filepath.Join(dir, "draft-"+c.Request.URL.Query().Get("id")+".json")
	return os.WriteFile(path, []byte(c.Request.PostFormValue("body")), 0644)
}
